xinomyzithra-with-garlic-yogurt-and-roas.name: Xinomyzithra With Garlic Yogurt And Roasted Cherry Tomatoes
xinomyzithra-with-garlic-yogurt-and-roas.original_name: Ξινομυζήθρα με σκορδάτο γιαούρτι και ψητά ντοματίνια
instructions: Wash the tomatoes, dry them and put them in a baking pan.
Add the garlic, thyme, oregano, olive oil, vinegar, salt and pepper.
Mix and Bake in a preheated oven at 2003
Let them cool down and make some broths on the baking pan.
Press the garlic cloves and take their baked flesh.
Transfer to a bowl and melt with a fork.
Add the yogurt and 2 tablespoons of the liquids and mix.
Finally, we incorporate the sour-skinned trinkets by mixing.
Spread the cheese mixture on a plate and make the center a hollow, where we put the tomatoes.
Garnish with some pesto and pour some liquids from the baking pan.
Serve with baked pies or toasted bread.
